title: hieracium pilosella subsp. cingulatum
intro: Hieracium pilosella subsp. cingulatum, also known as Pilosella cingulata, is a subspecies of the hawkweed plant, a flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium pilosella subsp. cingulatum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and treating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
